title: Why can't file form questions accept all that file columns do?

posts.author: HannahT (Hannah)
posts.cookedHtml:
File columns allow adding files ‘From computer’, ‘From Google Drive’, ‘From Link’, and more.

So why can’t file questions in Forms accept all the same types that the column does?

I currently have to have a file question mapped to a file column AND a link question mapped to a link column, even though the file column could hold both.

Does anyone have workaround advice?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Hannah,

Thank you for your feedback, which I have relayed directly with the product team internally.

I’ve spoken with the team internally and wanted to provide you with a little more context. The file question is a newer question type we’ve built and it’s a leaner version of the file column. We do have plans to support different file upload sources such as the link type in the future, so do stay tuned for updates!
